requirement_topic.en: ANATEL Homologation and EMC for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的ANATEL认证与EMC
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的ANATEL認證與EMC

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) sold in Brazil must meet the INMETRO conformity obligations for the battery plus, where they incorporate any radiocommunication function, mandatory ANATEL homologation. If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), ANATEL homologation under Resolucao 715/2019 (general homologation regulation) and the applicable Atos de Requisitos Tecnicos is required before the product can be marketed, and the ANATEL homologation seal with the OCD/ANATEL number must appear on the product. ANATEL testing is performed by an ANATEL-designated OCD (Organismo de Certificacao Designado) and accredited laboratory, and covers RF spectrum, EMC, and SAR where applicable. There is no Brazilian CE mark; conformity is shown by the INMETRO and ANATEL identification marks.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）须满足电池的INMETRO合格评定义务；若其含任何无线电通信功能，还须取得强制ANATEL认证。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），在产品上市前须依据第715/2019号决议（通用认证规章）及适用的技术要求文件（Atos de Requisitos Tecnicos）取得ANATEL认证，并在产品上标注含OCD/ANATEL编号的ANATEL认证标识。ANATEL检测由ANATEL指定的OCD（指定认证机构）及认可实验室完成，涵盖射频频谱、EMC及适用的SAR。巴西没有CE标志；合格性通过INMETRO和ANATEL标识体现。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）須滿足電池的INMETRO合格評定義務；若其含任何無線電通信功能，還須取得強制ANATEL認證。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），在產品上市前須依據第715/2019號決議（通用認證規章）及適用的技術要求文件（Atos de Requisitos Tecnicos）取得ANATEL認證，並在產品上標註含OCD/ANATEL編號的ANATEL認證標識。ANATEL檢測由ANATEL指定的OCD（指定認證機構）及認可實驗室完成，涵蓋射頻頻譜、EMC及適用的SAR。巴西沒有CE標誌；合格性通過INMETRO和ANATEL標識體現。

standards_or_laws: ANATEL Resolucao 715/2019 — Regulamento para Avaliacao da Conformidade e Homologacao de Produtos para Telecomunicacoes
ANATEL Atos de Requisitos Tecnicos — applicable to short-range/restricted-radiation devices (Bluetooth, NFC, Qi)
Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 — battery conformity assessment (applies to the battery part of the power bank)
ABNT NBR IEC 62133 — cell/pack safety within the INMETRO programme

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Part 1: Class B equipment) for emissions, and GB/T 17618-2015 (Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised under the Brazilian ANATEL homologation or INMETRO conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——第1部分：B类设备），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性限值和测量方法）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准在巴西ANATEL认证或INMETRO合格评定路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——第1部分：B類設備），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性限值和測量方法）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准在巴西ANATEL認證或INMETRO合格評定路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics (USB charging IC, protection circuit, display, or wireless function) must demonstrate conformity to the Brazilian regime, which differs from China's. The battery is covered by mandatory INMETRO certification; any radiocommunication function triggers mandatory ANATEL homologation. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals are not accepted by Brazilian designated bodies. For ANATEL-applicable products: (1) the device must operate only within ANATEL-authorised frequency bands and power limits, which differ from Chinese SRRC allocations; (2) testing must be done by an ANATEL-designated OCD with an accredited laboratory, and the ANATEL homologation seal with the number must be affixed; (3) the product must simultaneously carry the INMETRO conformity mark for the battery and the ANATEL homologation mark for the radio function. Many Chinese power banks designed for the domestic market may use frequency channels or wireless protocols (e.g., specific Qi variants) that require re-characterisation for Brazilian ANATEL homologation. Note Brazil's mains supply is 127/220 V at 60 Hz, differing from China's 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so any bundled AC charger must also suit the Brazilian grid and INMETRO plug/charger rules.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源（USB充电IC、保护电路、显示屏或无线功能）须证明符合巴西制度，该制度与中国不同。电池部分受强制INMETRO认证约束；任何无线电通信功能均触发强制ANATEL认证。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准不被巴西指定机构接受。对于须取得ANATEL认证的产品：（1）设备只能在ANATEL授权的频段和功率限值内运行，这与中国SRRC的分配不同；（2）检测须由ANATEL指定的OCD及认可实验室完成，并须加贴含编号的ANATEL认证标识；（3）产品须同时标注电池的INMETRO合格标识及无线功能的ANATEL认证标识。许多面向中国市场设计的移动电源可能使用的频道或无线协议（如特定Qi变体）需经重新表征方可满足巴西ANATEL认证。注意巴西市电为127/220 V、60 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz不同，因此任何随附的交流充电器还须适配巴西电网及INMETRO插头/充电器规则。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源（USB充電IC、保護電路、顯示幕或無線功能）須證明符合巴西制度，該制度與中國不同。電池部分受強制INMETRO認證約束；任何無線電通信功能均觸發強制ANATEL認證。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准不被巴西指定機構接受。對於須取得ANATEL認證的產品：（1）設備只能在ANATEL授權的頻段和功率限值內運行，這與中國SRRC的分配不同；（2）檢測須由ANATEL指定的OCD及認可實驗室完成，並須加貼含編號的ANATEL認證標識；（3）產品須同時標註電池的INMETRO合格標識及無線功能的ANATEL認證標識。許多面向中國市場設計的行動電源可能使用的頻道或無線協議（如特定Qi變體）需經重新表徵方可滿足巴西ANATEL認證。注意巴西市電為127/220 V、60 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz不同，因此任何隨附的交流充電器還須適配巴西電網及INMETRO插頭/充電器規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — INMETRO certification applies to the battery; ANATEL homologation under Resolucao 715/2019 is mandatory for power banks with any radiocommunication function before placement on the Brazilian market; both the INMETRO mark and the ANATEL homologation seal must appear on the product
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Brazil there is no CE mark; the battery requires the INMETRO conformity mark under Portaria 489/2018 and any radiocommunication function requires mandatory ANATEL homologation under Resolucao 715/2019, with testing by an ANATEL-designated OCD. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approvals are not accepted as Brazilian conformity evidence. The product must simultaneously carry the INMETRO mark and the ANATEL homologation seal, and operate within ANATEL-authorised frequency bands that differ from Chinese SRRC allocations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西没有CE标志；电池须依据第489/2018号法令取得INMETRO合格标识，任何无线电通信功能须依据第715/2019号决议取得强制ANATEL认证，由ANATEL指定的OCD检测。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准不被接受为巴西符合性证据。产品须同时标注INMETRO标识和ANATEL认证标识，并在与中国SRRC分配不同的ANATEL授权频段内运行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西沒有CE標誌；電池須依據第489/2018號法令取得INMETRO合格標識，任何無線電通信功能須依據第715/2019號決議取得強制ANATEL認證，由ANATEL指定的OCD檢測。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准不被接受為巴西符合性證據。產品須同時標註INMETRO標識和ANATEL認證標識，並在與中國SRRC分配不同的ANATEL授權頻段內運行。

source.publisher: ANATEL — Agencia Nacional de Telecomunicacoes (Certificacao e Homologacao de Produtos)
